name: Kaseya VSA Agent – Kaseya VSA Agent configuration including server address, age
categoryDescription: Registry artifacts for 23 Remote Monitoring & Management (RMM) tools documented in the LOLRMM project (lolrmm.io). These tools have legitimate uses but are frequently abused by ransomware operators, APT groups, and tech-support fraud actors for persistent remote access. Each entry maps directly from lolrmm.io/api/rmm_tools.json. Parsed: 65 registry key paths across 23 tools.
description: [Kaseya VSA Agent] Kaseya VSA Agent configuration including server address, agent GUID, and organization ID
forensic_value: Server address reveals VSA server being used for management; AgentGUID uniquely identifies the endpoint in the Kaseya infrastructure; org ID for attribution
